articles.title: Understanding Swift Concurrency
articles.author: Jane Appleseed
articles.summary: A practical guide to async/await and actors in Swift 6.
articles.content: Swift concurrency introduces structured concurrency patterns that improve safety and performance across Apple platforms.

articles.title: Clean Architecture on iOS
articles.author: John Architect
articles.summary: Layer separation with MVVM in SwiftUI applications.
articles.content: Clean Architecture keeps business rules independent from frameworks and UI, enabling testable and maintainable codebases.

articles.title: Persisting Favorites with SwiftData
articles.author: Alex Developer
articles.summary: Local persistence patterns for user-curated content.
articles.content: SwiftData integrates with SwiftUI for modern persistence workflows without Core Data boilerplate.
